summary: Drafted the API provider activation proposal. It treats OpenAI API, Anthropic API, and auto_router as candidate provider paths, requires human-selected credentials and model policy before any paid call, enforces hard cost ceilings, and preserves raw+parsed provider evidence with drift fail-closed behavior.
recommendation_for_human: Proceed to Gate O review. Do not make any real provider call; after Gate O only contract preflight artifacts are authorized.
notes: No provider call, credential read, network call, deploy, PR, or external repo mutation is authorized by this proposal.
